target: 67. Interrogation of Mio

(Hashi's hacking was successful,
the shadow Mio became defenseless)

(We moved to the school infirmary and
began questioning her right away…)
What's your name?
…Kofune… Mio…
When were you… born from whom?

Yesterday… during the wake…
Mother scanned Mio and then…
I was born in a cave that night.
"Mother" means Haine with Shiori's appearance, right?
…Yes.
You broke Mio's bicycle brake?
Yeah.
To kill me?!

I didn't really care about dying… if she got hurt and went to the hospital,
it would have been easier for me…

So you wanted her killed in the hospital
where it'd be easy to switch!

That's right.
Sou is on the Shadow's side.
Was that Haine's order?

No, I just did it myself… 
But it failed.
Creating a Shadow of Mio…I hadn't heard about that.

Relax, Tokiko. 
Now I don't even know why I wanted to kill her…
Haine had you born to find Hashi's Shadow?

Yeah…
She was a traitor who opposed Mother,
and might have been an obstacle…

But today, during the funeral, my father's Shadow got killed
Mother said it was Hizuru's doing.

Plus Shin-chan and everyone else are in on it…
So I targeted them all.

What the hell are you!?
What's a Shadow!? 
Tell me your purpose!!!
What is a person?
Ah!!!

Purpose? 
What's the purpose of people?

That… that's just…
We all live without really knowing!
I only have Mio's memories until the 21st, and knowledge of what I can do as a Shadow.

I can't make copies of people!
Can you?

There are two types of copying:
"Transformation," where I copy onto my own body,
and "Childbirth," where I split myself to create a new Shadow.
We kids can only give birth once…
"Kids"?

Haine can have as many children as she wants… 
But her body is weak, even Haine finds it hard.

The kids born from me won't be able to give birth…
"Transformation" is something all Shadows can do any number of times.
Whether via birth/transformation, copying a person and failing to kill them within 7 days turns your body into mud.

I only have six days left…
But right now I just feel… "So what?"

(Mio is honestly answering our questions. 
It seems the hacking worked well after all. 
Time to wrap up…)
Kaori, you can stop hiding now.
Yeah.
Do you know who I am?
…Who?

Have you ever heard the name 
"Kaori Koyuba"?
Kaori Koyuba… I've heard of her somewhere…

Ah! 
The idol Kaori-chan?
Why is she here…?

Um…
Shinpei, can I say this?
Before that, she's not on Haine's "target" list right?

Hadn't you already shared information
before coming to the school tonight?

I haven't heard anything. 
I just found out I was here.
So that's how it is…
Thank goodness…

(Now we know Haine hasn't discovered 
that Kaori is with us)
(I have so many things I want to ask. Let's go one by one…)
What should I ask first…
"Tell me more about Shadows"
"How do you eat?"
"How many Shadow individuals are there?"
"Why does your atmosphere differ from Mio's?"
Tell me more about Shadows.

Haine's children - 
Doppelgängers who copy people's appearances…
They take over families and live pretending to be humans.

Do Shadows have an instinct to reproduce
and thrive, or are they just fake copies of humans?
I don't know…
How do you eat?

Do you have three meals a day properly? 
If not, would you starve to death?

Shadows eat information.
Information including taste is nutrition for us.

Mother… Haine has forbidden everyone
from eating people in any way other than childbirth or transformation.

But even without being told, 
I just feel like having okonomiyaki…

Because it's delicious,
and there is information in eggs, pork meat, and cabbage too.
If I don't eat, of course I'll starve to death like anyone else.

…Haine only eats humans. 
I think it's probably because she likes the taste.

But if that's the case, they'd starve so we need to transfuse…
Human blood contains a lot of information.

Eating information…
What are Shadows made of?

Body? I don't know… 
Haine calls it "mud." That's all…
How many Shadows are there?
…I don't know.

Haine hasn't given birth for the past few decades 
because she's been weakening…
She only gave birth in order to perform a resurrection ritual.

Currently, the Shadows hiding as humans are probably 
a few children born within two months,
and their offspring from those kids.
The number of Shadows is unknown…

I already confirmed several Shadow pairs at today's funeral.
Besides the Kobayakawa family, I recognized some faces too.

The Koguchi Family and Hitobuchi Family. 
There are more to investigate though.
How many Stray Shadows are there too?
Sorry, I have no idea.
Probably Haine doesn't fully know either.

…Mio, your personality or atmosphere…
It feels different from the real one somehow.

Shadows are perfect copies of people. 
My body, voice, fingerprints, DNA, memories,
everything is exactly like Mio's… but…

With memory alone…
You know, humans forget things.
Selective memory?

Yes. Shadows don't have the ability to "forget" 
unpleasant memories or trivial, unimportant ones.

So I remember everything equally. Even things that person has forgotten
or repressed, they get copied too when I copy them.

This difference in memory causes personality differences,
I think.
Repressed feelings…

But, but you're my older sister!
You are still your real self right?!

My older sister has human-level memory…
…Is she defective?
That's a bad way to put it.
…Well, Hashi is special I guess.

(…The more I listen, the deeper this mystery gets. 
But we need to gather as much information as possible.)
(Other things I want to ask are…)
"What's the Shadow ecosystem like?"
"How do Shadows share information?"
"Are there different types of Shadows?"
"On copied data"

What's the Shadow ecosystem like?
Even if they live as humans, 
they can't stay in that form forever right?

Yeah… They age and weaken until eventually dying. 
Well, it's just pretending to die.

Older Shadows are faked as dead by Sou Clinic,
and then disappear from society…

They pretend to be dead, and transform into new targets 
to start a fresh life as someone else.

Normally the Shadow ecosystem is just this cycle…
I've heard it from my father too.

If they transform many times, 
the copy quality starts to degrade…

Their bodies start breaking down,
they get memory disorders or personality issues
and eventually can't imitate humans anymore.
Once that happens, they go into the wilderness as Strays.
Tell me about Shadow information sharing methods.

Haine can send simple commands…
like "go there" or "kill that person"
through radio waves.

But this is one-way only,
the kids and grandkids can't reply to Haine.
To communicate, they must talk, call phones, leave notes, meet in person, touch, and share memories.
So it's basically the same for everyone then.

Are there different types of Shadows?
Like babies, or monsters with long limbs,
or muscular ones…

Babies are Strays.
Older shadows whose human forms have broken down.

My copy ability has weakened, and I can't give birth.  
Transforming isn't perfect either, so it's rare for me to show my face in public.

Stray Shadows eat mice, birds, fish, insects, and live quietly where they won't be seen.  
They avoid attention.
Their appearances vary by individual, but in the end, everyone becomes baby-like before disappearing as mud without memory or personality.
Shadows grow childlike with age… Perhaps their essence is similar to humans?
The shadows specialized in fighting sent by Haine are called "Humanless."
Most individuals stray from human forms, developing oversized muscles or elongated limbs.
Their combat abilities skyrocket but their intelligence plummets, losing all human thought processes.
My Rosenkrantz and Guildenstern are Humanless, right?
What's with that name…
Naming is my hobby.
Those recognized by Haine receive shadows that obey their commands… This has been the tradition for ages.
…Which one's Rosenkrantz?
The dazed, slobbering one is Rosz, and the grumpy one with a hand injury is Guild.
Though I don't have copy abilities like strays, my combat skills are far superior to other stray Shadows.
The nurse… Kotori's Shadow…That's Dad!?!
Yeah, she's Haine's caretaker.
I have a question about copying objects.
It was Totsumura's pistol used in the gym, but it's a copy of Ushio's.
Even after emptying bullets, if I erase and print again, they return to full capacity.
Yeah.
But the gasoline he lit up seems to have had its data erased from Ushio's head.
That's right! Why?
Whether the data can be reused through inanimate transformations depends on whether it was consumed or destroyed.
What's that?
"Consumption," like batteries and bullets, can be restored by reprinting. But "destruction"? That's impossible.
Lighting gasoline on fire would count as destruction, right?
The pistol was consumed and the gas destroyed.
Yeah.
So if this gun breaks or falls apart, it's no good either.
About non-humans… Do their copies have weaknesses in the "plane"?
When transforming, the shadow itself is disguised so its plane is weak. But copied objects are just regular shadows.
To destroy them, break their three-dimensionality… I don't understand why though.
The nail gun was definitely destroyed.
…But if Ushio carried the damaged data into the next cycle…
Even if you loop, Ushio's time isn't resetting.
Yeah… I'm basically made of data so…
I follow Shinpei's consciousness as he rewinds time.
That's why Shide said, I think when I die it'll be over… Even if we loop, the current me won't exist anymore.
(That's about all I wanted to ask…)

Sorry, Shin-chan…  
I didn't have much useful info.
S-sorry! That's not something you should apologize for!!
Hey, that guy's a shadow, Sou!!
Ah… but…
…Damn it!!! My rhythm's messed up!!

Haine needs to consume many people to revive…  
The births are for creating soldiers.
Me and Dad were trying to resurrect Mom by feeding Haine…as food.
But it was wrong… I was deceived… They have another purpose!!
In the Hiruko Cave, he said Dad "agreed"…
What's with this crap… Dad… He thinks we can die!!
…Dad…
There's a lot I don't understand… But Professor Hishigata should know Haine's real purpose.
Maybe there's a solution somewhere…
I've got an appointment with Dad at 10 tonight.
Alright… Our next goal is set.
…I'm going…

Sou!!?  
You're leaving alone?!
Hey! Wait up, Sou!!!
What's there to wait for?! I'm going back right now to meet Dad…!
Wait.
…Move please…
You're helping the Shadow's side, Sou…
It's too dangerous… I can't let you go alone!
He's right. Let's all go to Hishigata Clinic.

Itch… so much here!  
There are way too many mosquitoes!
…Mio.
Huh?
Ah, no…
…Me?
Yeah… Protect Mio.
Is that an order?
It's more like… yeah, it is.

…So Shin-chan, are you scared of me?  
You're keeping a lot of distance.
S-sure… I'm not lying when I say it's scary! How many times have I been killed by you?!

That was another world, right?  
I haven't killed anyone yet.
S-sorry… but…
…Can I ask a question too?
U-uh, sure… What is it?
Did you get a girlfriend in Tokyo?!
Gah!!
Girlfriend?
Girlfriend?! What are you asking me that for??
Shin-chan, sometimes your dialect is suspicious… isn't it?
I'm not like that!! If I speak Kansai-ben in Tokyo, people won't understand! I follow local customs!
Then what's your relationship with Kaori?
What do you mean… Koyuba was my classmate. You should remember that, right?
H-hold on!!
Hmm… Even though this was a joke…
But have you ever thought why I don't call you "onii-chan"?

Eh…?  
S-sure, I guess…
O-oh! They're here!! Let's talk about this later!!!
Hey Shin-chan, I'll protect Mio as ordered.
But… the only one who can really protect Mio is you, right?
Then let's go.
…I don't get it at all!!! Who is this person?! Come on, hurry up!! Shin-chan!
O-oh… yeah.
Everyone's aboard. Let's go.
…Yes.
